title: Agilan
desc: Madurai's ACP gets the heat from his seniors for his team's poor performance. In order to mend that, he plans a fake operation for his team. But his plan goes awry due to a meddling sub-inspector.

title: Kaalatpadai
desc: Sridhar fights with Ram for dating his sister. Ram and Priya get married secretly with the help of Ram's parents and friends. Ram's father advises him to find a job and then start a married life.

title: Roja
desc: Roja, a simple girl from a village in Tamil Nadu, makes desperate efforts to find her husband, Rishi, after he is kidnapped by militants during a secret undercover mission in Jammu and Kashmir.

title: Jerry
desc: Jerry, a guy with a cynical attitude towards the concept of love, is challenged by his friends to make three women fall in love with him. Jerry takes up the challenge and begins flirting with them.

title: Ettu Thikkum Madha Yana
desc: When his father is found dead, Natesan decides to find the culprits. While investigating, he learns that his father's death is connected to the murder of his childhood friend.

title: 5 Star
desc: Five college friends promise to stay together even after completing their education. However, one of them hides from the others that he has been forced to marry a village girl.

title: Vasantha Vaasal
desc: Vijay, Divya's tenant, aspires to become an actor and constantly disturbs her by reciting movie dialogues loudly. Divya, who wants to excel in studies, despises the film industry.

title: Thalakonam
desc: Thalakonam is ithesh in the lead role an action-drama in romatical love story movie

title: Puthumai Pithan
desc: Jeeva is framed and sent to a mental asylum and his family murdered when he earns the enmity of a corrupt politician. He escapes the asylum and exacts revenge on the politician who destroyed his life.

title: Gummalam
desc: Four friends fall in love with Rathi when she moves in into their neighbour's house. Later, the police arrest her and they all get shocked to learn about her true identity.

title: Magane En Marumagan
desc: Singaram, a loafer, tricks a rich man in a village and gets married to his daughter. When Singaram is accused of killing his enemy, he is forced to flee to Chennai.

title: Kalai Jan
desc: Pop singer Inderjeet is the main suspect after his female fans are killed by a serial killer. Divya, whose sister was a dancer in his troupe and the first target, comes to the city to find the killer.

title: Dharmathin Thalaivan
desc: When Raju loses his soft-spoken, loving elder brother Balu in a fight, he gives up his violent ways. However, his life changes for the better when he meets his brother's lookalike, who is a criminal.

title: Chennai Ungalai Anbudan Varaverikirath
desc: Three bachelors face several difficult hurdles when they move to Chennai in a bid to make something of their lives and try to overcome the internal and external troubles that they face.

title: Aaranyam
desc: Aravind, a young robber, falls in love with Divya who is one of his victims. But her father, a police officer, is against their relationship, so they both elope into a dense forest and live together.

title: Acharam
desc: Suriya, a sub-inspector, hates modern women and kills them secretly at night. When he meets Ramya, the wife of an architect, he becomes obsessed with her.

title: Mugamariyaan
desc: A serial killer commits a series of murders and then steals the hearts of the victims. However, when five college girls get trapped in his hands, it is up to them to decide how to escape alive.
